strategy: His Acrimony turns all incoming healing into damage for the whole team for 99 rounds, so do not heal; win by bursting, not sustaining.
Cast an Aura on round 1 to overwrite one of the two Acrimony auras. Only round-1 auras help; any later Aura triggers a Supernova that strips it and re-applies Acrimony.
Do not cast positive Charms. Enki answers with a Sprite heal on your team, which becomes damage under Acrimony. Use Enki's free Fireblades and Deathblades (every 2nd round) as your buffs instead.
Watch Enki's timers (Incindiate every 5th round, Scald after he attacks) and burst the group down; the Prophet takes +Life and resists Death 71%.
Team: there is no healer role here, so run extra shields and absorbs behind a big hitter who AoEs the boss and minions together.
cheatNotes: At round 1 (or on a late join) he casts a negative Acrimony on all wizards that turns incoming healing into damage for 99 rounds; it is applied twice but does not stack.
Casting an Aura on round 1 overwrites one of the two Acrimony auras, and you get your own aura plus the remaining one.
Casting an Aura on any later turn makes him Supernova it away and re-apply the Acrimony to everyone.
Every 2nd round Enki gives each wizard a +25% Fireblade or +25% Deathblade.
If a wizard casts a positive Charm, Enki casts an all-enemy Sprite that heals your team 500 over 4 rounds, which becomes damage under Acrimony.
After Enki attacks, or on a late join, he casts Scald on the wizards.
